field.label: Version
field.help: Display the version.

field.label: Time
field.help: Display the time.

field.label: Up-time
field.help: Display the up-time.

field.label: Hostname
field.help: Display the Hostname.

field.label: System
field.help: Display system info.

field.label: Disk
field.help: Display the percentage of disk-space used.

field.label: Load
field.help: Display the load average of the system over the last 1, 5, and 15 minutes.

field.label: States
field.help: Display the states.

field.label: Carp
field.help: Display CARP state.

field.label: IPsec
field.help: Display IPsec tunnels.

field.label: Interfaces
field.help: Display status of interfaces.

field.label: Gateway Summary
field.help: Display up/down status count for enabled gateways.

field.label: Gateway Status
field.help: Display detailed status for monitored gateways. A 4-row 20-column display size, or higher, is required for this screen.

field.label: Mbuf
field.help: Display the MBuf usage.

field.label: Package Info
field.help: Display package count/updates.

field.label: CPU Frequency
field.help: Display CPU power saving rate.

field.label: NTP Status
field.help: Display NTP status.

field.label: CPU Temperature
field.help: Display CPU temperature.

field.label: Temperature Unit
field.help: Unit of temperature.

field.label: Traffic of interface
field.help: Display total bytes since last boot (in and out), for selected interface.

field.label: Traffic Interface
field.help: Select the interface for traffic display.

field.label: Interfaces by traffic
field.help: Interfaces listed with current bits-per-second (in and out). A 4-row 20-column display size, or higher, is recommended for this screen.

field.label: Interfaces by volume
field.help: Interfaces listed with total bytes since last boot (in and out). A 4-row 20-column display size, or higher, is recommended for this screen.

field.label: Interfaces by volume today
field.help: Interfaces listed with total bytes since the start of the day, or since LCDproc reset (in and out). A 4-row 20-column display size, or higher, is recommended for this screen.

field.label: Interfaces link status
field.help: Display the interfaces current link status. This will create a separate status screen for each interface with four lines each. A 4-row 20-column display size, or higher, is recommended for this screen.

field.label: Addresses by traffic
field.help: Display IP traffic. A 4-row 20-column display size, or higher, is recommended for this screen.

field.label: Traffic by Address Interface
field.help: Select the interface for traffic by address monitoring.

field.label: Sort by
field.help: Sort traffic by address results by incoming or outgoing traffic.

field.label: Filter
field.help: Filter traffic by address to show local, remote, or all IPs.

field.label: Display
field.help: Display hosts by their IP address, host name, description, or FQDN.

field.label: APC UPS Info
field.help: Display current APC UPS status from APCUPSD Package.

field.label: NUT UPS Info
field.help: Display current UPS status from NUT Package.
